name: HAS_C_INVOICELINES
validation_code: @SQL=select 'Y' from dual where exists (select 1 from c_invoiceline where c_invoice_id = @C_INVOICE_ID@)

name: showAddPayment
validation_code:
@SQL=select case when sum(fpsd.amount)=ci.GrandTotal then 'N' else 'Y' end 
          from fin_payment_scheduledetail fpsd
                 join fin_payment_detail fpd on fpsd.fin_payment_detail_id=fpd.fin_payment_detail_id
                join fin_payment fp on fpd.fin_payment_id=fp.fin_payment_id
                join fin_payment_schedule ps ON ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = fpsd.fin_payment_schedule_invoice
                join c_invoice ci on ci.c_invoice_id=ps.c_invoice_id
                WHERE ps.c_invoice_id =@c_invoice_id@
                and to_number(aprm_seqnumberpaymentstatus(fp.status)) >= 40
                group by ci.GrandTotal

name: DOCBASETYPE
validation_code:
@SQL=select coalesce(max(dt.docbasetype), 'API') from c_invoice inv join c_doctype dt on (inv.c_doctypetarget_id = dt.c_doctype_id)
where inv.c_invoice_id = @c_invoice_id@

name: HASSECONDUOM
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT (CASE COUNT(*) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS TOTAL FROM M_PRODUCT_UOM WHERE M_PRODUCT_ID=@M_Product_ID@ AND ISACTIVE='Y'

name: LC_MATCHED
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(LINENETAMT) - SUM(COALESCE(M_LC_MATCHED.AMT_INVOICE_CURRENCY, M_LC_MATCHED.amount))=0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM M_LC_COST, M_LC_MATCHED, C_INVOICELINE WHERE M_LC_COST.ISMATCHED = 'Y' AND M_LC_COST.M_LC_COST_ID = M_LC_MATCHED.M_LC_COST_ID AND C_INVOICELINE.C_INVOICELINE_ID = M_LC_MATCHED.C_INVOICELINE_ID AND M_LC_MATCHED.C_INVOICELINE_ID = @C_InvoiceLine_ID@

name: Parent_AD_Org
UsesAlternate
validation_code: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(C_TAX_ID)>0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ISUSED FROM C_TAX WHERE C_TAX_ISMEMBER(@C_TAX_ID@, C_TAX_ID)=1 AND BASEAMOUNT IN ('TBA', 'TBATAX')

name: HASREVERSEDINVOICEPO
validation_code:
@SQL=SELECT 'Y' 
FROM DUAL 
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM C_INVOICE_REVERSE WHERE C_INVOICE_ID = @C_Invoice_ID@ )
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM C_CONVERSION_RATE_DOCUMENT WHERE C_INVOICE_ID = (SELECT REVERSED_C_INVOICE_ID
                                                                               FROM C_INVOICE_REVERSE
                                                                               WHERE C_INVOICE_ID = @C_Invoice_ID@))
